title: Terminal Agents Suffice for Enterprise Automation

details.title: Terminal Agents Suffice for Enterprise Automation
details.abstract: Terminal-based coding agents using direct API access can match or outperform GUI and tool-augmented agents for enterprise automation, suggesting strong foundation models with simple programmatic interfaces are often sufficient.

title: GaussianGPT: Towards Autoregressive 3D Gaussian Scene Generation

details.title: GaussianGPT: Towards Autoregressive 3D Gaussian Scene Generation

title: Think, Act, Build: An Agentic Framework with Vision Language Models for Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding

details.title: Think, Act, Build: An Agentic Framework with Vision Language Models for Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding
details.abstract: We introduce TAB (Think, Act, Build), a dynamic agentic framework designed for zero-shot 3D Visual Grounding (3D-VG). By operating directly on raw RGB-D streams, TAB reformulates 3D grounding from a static proposal matching task into an active semantic reasoning and geometric reconstruction process.

title: MMaDA-VLA: Large Diffusion Vision-Language-Action Model with Unified Multi-Modal Instruction and Generation

details.title: MMaDA-VLA: Large Diffusion Vision-Language-Action Model with Unified Multi-Modal Instruction and Generation
details.abstract: We present MMaDA-VLA, a fully native pre-trained large diffusion VLA model that unifies multi-modal understanding and generation in a single framework.
